title: Record what happens at the border

lines.text: Last section, the Border Liaison Log.
When you're stationed at a border post, you record the reality on the ground here.
First, pick which One-Stop Border Post you're at, Tunduma, Namanga, Rusumo, or Kabanga.
Then log the institutional wait time in minutes, the real delay the cargo faced.
And write a clearance override note, what went wrong and how you resolved it in person.
arg: TANSAD portal failed mid-clearance. Re-validated manually with the customs desk; convoy released after 4 hours.

lines.text: Then log the entry. This is your physical moat made visible.
